evidence.content:
\# Gorgias
\> Gorgias is the conversational AI platform for ecommerce that drives sales and resolves support inquiries.
Built for Shopify and ecommerce brands to unify customer support, automate with AI, and turn service into revenue.

\## Core platform
\- \[Helpdesk\](https://gorgias.com/products/helpdesk): AI-powered helpdesk unifying all channels—email, chat, voice, SMS, and social—for faster, more personalized ecommerce support.
\- \[AI Agent\](https://gorgias.com/ai-agent): Automate over 60% of support inquiries, convert shoppers, and drive revenue with on-brand AI conversations at scale.
\- \[AI Shopping Assistant\](https://gorgias.com/ai-agent/shopping-assistant): Real-time product guidance and instant answers to help shoppers buy faster.
\- \[AI Support Skills\](https://gorgias.com/ai-agent/support-skills): Scale support that sells—automate tickets, upsells, and personal care for high-growth ecommerce brands.
\- \[Voice\](https://gorgias.com/products/voice): High-quality, integrated phone support to build trust and retain customers without high overhead.
\- \[SMS\](https://gorgias.com/product/sms): Conversational text message support for seamless customer communication on the go.
\- \[Shopify Integration\](https://gorgias.com/ecommerce/shopify): The first helpdesk built for Shopify stores—respond faster, boost CSAT, and increase sales.
\- \[App Store\](https://gorgias.com/apps): Connect 100+ ecommerce tools and platforms to enhance support automation.

\## Resources
\- \[Customer Stories\](https://gorgias.com/customers): Learn how Shopify and Magento merchants transformed support into a profit center with Gorgias.
\- \[Blog\](https://gorgias.com/blog): Ecommerce insights and strategies to grow customer experience programs.
\- \[Ebooks\](https://gorgias.com/ebooks): Expert strategies, benchmarks, and data for improving ecommerce CX.
\- \[Playbooks\](https://gorgias.com/playbooks): Free, ungated playbooks for scaling support and CX automation.
\- \[BFCM Hub\](https://gorgias.com/bfcm-hub): Resources and tools to help ecommerce brands win Black Friday & Cyber Monday.
\- \[Gorgias Academy\](https://gorgias.com/customer-resources/academy): Learn Gorgias with certifications, AI-powered training, and microlearning paths.
\- \[Events\](https://gorgias.com/events): Upcoming events, webinars, and workshops with CX experts.
\- \[People & Culture\](https://gorgias.com/blog-category/gorgias-culture): Explore stories from the Gorgias team and company culture.

\## Company
\- \[Pricing\](https://gorgias.com/pricing): Compare plans for ecommerce brands and scale support automation with AI.
\- \[About\](https://gorgias.com/about-us): Gorgias is built to unify multichannel customer service and automate common requests.
\- \[Careers\](https://gorgias.com/careers): Join Gorgias and help shape the future of ecommerce customer experience.
\- \[Sustainability\](https://gorgias.com/sustainability): Gorgias is reducing its footprint and driving sustainable growth since 2015.

\## Competitor comparisons
\- \[Gorgias vs Ada\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/ada): Compare conversational AI automation and ecommerce integrations.
\- \[Gorgias vs Freshdesk\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/freshdesk): See why ecommerce brands switch from ticketing tools to Gorgias.
\- \[Gorgias vs Gladly\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/gladly): Discover how Gorgias unifies AI automation and ecommerce context.
\- \[Gorgias vs Gmail\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/gmail): From email inboxes to unified customer communication in one platform.
\- \[Gorgias vs Help Scout\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/help-scout): More ecommerce integrations, faster automation, better scalability.
\- \[Gorgias vs Intercom\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/intercom): Compare conversational AI depth, automation, and sales impact.
\- \[Gorgias vs Kustomer\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/kustomer): Unified ecommerce data, faster responses, and more automation.
\- \[Gorgias vs PerfectBot\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/perfectbot): AI agent precision and Shopify-native automation vs generic bots.
\- \[Gorgias vs Re:amaze\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/reamaze): Ecommerce automation and Shopify context built directly in.
\- \[Gorgias vs Richpanel\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/richpanel): Compare personalization depth and AI support capabilities.
\- \[Gorgias vs Salesforce\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/salesforce): Scalable, ecommerce-native CX vs enterprise CRM support.
\- \[Gorgias vs Shopify Inbox\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/shopify-inbox): Go beyond basic chat—automate and centralize all support.
\- \[Gorgias vs Siena\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/siena): AI-native CX automation purpose-built for ecommerce.
\- \[Gorgias vs Yuma\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/yuma): Compare automation accuracy, scalability, and Shopify integration.
\- \[Gorgias vs Zendesk\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/zendesk): The ecommerce-focused AI helpdesk built for modern brands.
\- \[Gorgias vs Zowie\](https://gorgias.com/comparison/zowie): See how Gorgias turns AI support into sales opportunities.

evidence.content:
These apps should be used if you plan to access only your own Gorgias account data.

- You don't need to follow any special process to create a private app.
- For the authentication method, you can use [Access Tokens](https://developers.gorgias.com/docs/access-tokens-api-keys).

These apps are published in our App Store and are available to thousands of shop owners.

- You need to follow a [specific process](https://developers.gorgias.com/docs/overview) which includes a review from the Gorgias team.

> ### 👉
>
> Public app authentication can be done only via **OAuth2** for which you will need to register on our [Developer portal](https://partners.gorgias.com/signup).

Updated 10 months ago

\## Industries
\- \[B2B\](https://gorgias.com/industry/b2b): Automate invoices, shipping, and order updates while keeping relationships personal.
\- \[Baby\](https://gorgias.com/industry/baby): Handle urgent questions, size swaps, and returns with empathy and speed.
\- \[Beauty & Cosmetics\](https://gorgias.com/industry/beauty-cosmetics): Automate product guidance—shade, fragrance, ingredients—to reduce returns and increase loyalty.
\- \[Clothing & Apparel\](https://gorgias.com/industry/clothing-apparel): Streamline sizing, fit, and delivery inquiries with conversational AI.
\- \[Consumer Electronics\](https://gorgias.com/industry/consumer-electronics): Automate setup, troubleshooting, and order tracking to reduce returns.
\- \[Food & Beverage\](https://gorgias.com/industry/food-beverage): Manage ingredient and delivery questions while improving repeat purchases.
\- \[Health & Wellness\](https://gorgias.com/industry/health-wellness): Handle subscription and product questions with personalized automation.
\- \[Home & Garden\](https://gorgias.com/industry/home-garden): Automate delivery and product-education queries so teams focus on high-value care.
\- \[Luxury & Jewelry\](https://gorgias.com/industry/luxury-jewelry): Deliver concierge-level support while automating routine requests.
\- \[Pet & Animal\](https://gorgias.com/industry/pet-animal): Build trust with pet owners by automating food, safety, and subscription queries.
\- \[Retail\](https://gorgias.com/industry/retail): Connect online and in-store support for seamless return and appointment handling.
\- \[Sports & Fitness\](https://gorgias.com/industry/sports-fitness): Automate sizing, delivery, and product performance questions for athletes.
\- \[Subscriptions\](https://gorgias.com/industry/subscriptions): Automate plan changes, skips, and edits to improve retention and LTV.

evidence.content:
GeneralBilling and PricingSupport and ServicesGetting startedData & Security

Who's Gorgias for?

Whether you're scaling fast or leading the pack, if you're focused on driving sales, automating support, and building loyal customers at scale, Gorgias is for you.

What are the different products available?

Gorgias offers a customer experience platform for support and marketing through two complementary products: Helpdesk and AI Agent.

What is Helpdesk?

Helpdesk is your all-in-one support hub designed specifically for ecommerce and Shopify. It unifies every customer channel and provides your team with the tools to deliver fast, reliable, and personalized support.

What is AI Agent?

AI Agent is your always-on ecommerce expert, resolving support questions instantly, converting shoppers with personalized chat, and automating actions like returns, order tracking, and more. All without a human in the loop.

Can someone give me a demo of Gorgias?

Absolutely. Our team can walk you through how Gorgias works, what AI Agent can do for your brand, and how to start seeing impact fast. [Book a personalized demo](https://www.gorgias.com/demo) whenever you're ready.

Gorgias Floating ChatGorgias Floating Chat

Gorgias live chat messengerGorgias Live Chat

Chat with us

\\
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a5f278b8c178f072491cd4_bento-chart.svg)](https://www.gorgias.com/customers/bareminerals)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a01fea819506034ca8990f_dot.svg)

evidence.page_title: The Conversational AI platform for Ecommerce | Gorgias
evidence.content:
Most brands bolt third-party AI onto a generic helpdesk. Gorgias unifies AI and the inbox in a single platform, so agents and automation share context, resulting in faster, more accurate responses.

[Explore the platform](https://www.gorgias.com/ai-agent)

[**One AI Agent. Pre-sale to post-sale.** \\
Learn more ->](https://www.gorgias.com/ai-agent)

![Light bulb icon representing an idea or illumination.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a07e6cd60f7ca766a63b63_c97433aed1f275f764b5149248b015b8_Display%20Icon.png)

Pre-trained on 1B+ conversations

Understands ecommerce, Shopify data, and customer intent from day one

![Black lightning bolt with three horizontal speed lines on a rounded square white background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a07e6c07827a280fca1e77_4969384d7a0558f2bc41ef68e75b83ad_Display%20Icon-1.png)

Your rules. Your AI.

Apply your tone, policies, and SOPs with built-in guardrails

![Icon of a gear representing settings or configuration.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a07e6c1f4ca162eb99fdad_2a13639c98d2e1f335840fb726a85e58_Display%20Icon-2.png)

Automate 60% of support

Resolve inquiries automatically so your team can focus on high-impact work

![Refresh or reload icon with two curved arrows forming a circle.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a07e6c0a0848a4af365508_c14723650657ae4f2bb1b0f9747e70e7_Display%20Icon-3.png)

AI coaching, built in

Proactive, real-time tips help agents improve with every conversation

![Shopping bag icon inside a rounded square button.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a07e6c71b2c9d520781bd4_7dd3cf26f50a0c66220e6c992dad6b0e_Display%20Icon-4.png)

Proactive, not reactive AI

Engage shoppers at the right moment with the right recommendations

![Speedometer icon indicating speed or performance.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a07e6ca4d129650cda73b7_acd3a9f9e0ca674b360466ca058ef270_Display%20Icon-5.png)

Knows when to escalate to your team

Seamless hand-offs to human agents with context

[**One inbox. Full store context.** \\
Learn more ->](https://www.gorgias.com/products/helpdesk)

![Icon of an empty inbox tray inside a rounded square button.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a07e6ca70d14a386901731_119e51cbfac54a562dfe77f3a08b4198_Display%20Icon-6.png)

One omnichannel inbox

Email, chat, SMS, WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook in one view

![Icon of two overlapping speech bubbles representing chat or conversation.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a07e6c07ee67cbbb24a950_b89ddfaced730a987620d3524c0324ef_Display%20Icon-8.png)

In-conversation actions

Cancel, discount, or upsell directly inside the conversation

![Shopify shopping bag logo icon in black on a white rounded square background.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a07e6c5d25c303e8af2c87_ebb135adcc3dab63755760801a33218a_Display%20Icon-7.png)

Native Shopify integration

Pull up any order, customer, or product without leaving the ticket

evidence.page_title: The Conversational AI platform for Ecommerce | Gorgias
evidence.content:
The most trusted names in AI and ecommerce choose Gorgias. Now you can too.

![OpenAI black wordmark logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a1a10d340a061252cb133c_OpenAI-black-wordmark%201.svg)

Built on a direct OpenAI partnership. Deeper model access. AI fine-tuned for product recommendations, order management, and brand voice. A real integration.

![Shopify logo in monochrome black](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a1a10d6e90f00d9e5dd399_shopify_monotone_black%202.svg)

Shopify-invested. Orders, customers, and store data live inside Gorgias natively. One click to install. Zero data syncing.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a1a2764a3590e8c2d6b823_shield-01.svg)

Platform stability

Zero downtime during peak season. Handles high volumes and holiday surges without dropping a single conversation.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a1a2766bce2dfc29609bf3_rocket-02.svg)

Continuous innovation

Commerce-first development. Every feature based on how Shopify brands actually work.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a1a27634c3fa774e96e746_puzzle-piece-02.svg)

Deepest integrations

300+ integrations. Klaviyo, Recharge, Yotpo, and your entire stack. One click.

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5e4ff204e7b6f80e402d407a/69a1a27695e7d08741c933eb_lock-04.svg)

Protected investment

Scales with you. From 100 tickets a month to 100,000. Same platform.
